title: Talking to the Landlord 和房东谈租金

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.content: Mr. Smith, I really like the apartment, but the rent is a bit high for me. Could you lower it a little?
lines.cn: 史密斯先生，我真的很喜欢这间公寓，但租金对我来说有点高。你能稍微降低一点吗？

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.content: I understand, but the price is already fair for this area. The apartment is newly renovated.
lines.cn: 我理解，但这个价格在这个区域已经很公道了。公寓是刚装修过的。

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.content: I know, but I am a long-term tenant. If I sign a one-year lease, would you consider a discount?
lines.cn: 我知道，但我是长期租户。如果我签一年租约，你能考虑给点优惠吗？

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.content: That is a good point. How about I reduce the rent by thirty dollars per month if you pay on time every month?
lines.cn: 说得有道理。如果你每月按时交租，我每月减30美元怎么样？

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.content: Thank you. Could you also include the internet fee in the rent? It would make things easier for me.
lines.cn: 谢谢。那能把网费也包含在租金里吗？这样对我来说更方便。

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.content: I can include the internet, but the rent will only drop by fifteen dollars instead of thirty. Is that okay?
lines.cn: 我可以包含网费，但租金只能减15美元而不是30美元。可以吗？

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.content: Deal. Can I pay the deposit by credit card?
lines.cn: 成交。我可以用信用卡付押金吗？

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.content: Yes, that is fine. I will prepare the contract, and you can sign it tomorrow.
lines.cn: 可以。我会准备合同，你明天来签字。

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.content: Perfect. Thank you for being so understanding.

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.content: You are welcome. I hope you enjoy living here.
lines.cn: 不客气。希望你住得愉快。
